summary: Made two surgical seam edits: carried June's end-of-chapter request into the opening paragraph to tighten the handoff from Chapter 2, and clarified Mohit's reply as narrowing "tomorrow" into an administrative discussion to smooth the transition into Chapter 4's Wednesday-morning aftermath.
